info.name: Techbrain API
info.description:
API collection for Techbrain.

All authenticated requests inherit Bearer Token auth from the collection root.
Login/Register requests auto-set tokens via test scripts.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. No auth required for these requests.

request.description: Register a new user account.

exec: // Tokens are set via httpOnly cookies, not in response body

request.description: Login with email and password. Tokens are set as httpOnly cookies.

exec: // Tokens are set via httpOnly cookies, not in response body

request.description: Refresh access token using the refresh_token cookie.
Logout and clear auth cookies.
Get the currently authenticated user.
Get all active sessions for the current user.
Logout from all sessions and invalidate all refresh tokens.

item.name: Users
item.description: User profile and avatar management. All requests require authentication (inherited from collection root).

request.description: Update the current user's profile. At least one field (firstName or lastName) must be provided.
Change the current user's password. Requires current password verification. Invalidates all sessions after successful change.
Soft-delete the current user's account. Requires password confirmation. Account data is permanently purged after 30 days.

formdata.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 10MB)

request.description: Upload or replace the current user's avatar. Accepts JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Max 10MB. Image is optimized and converted to WebP.
Delete the current user's avatar.
Get a user's avatar image by user ID. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

item.name: Products
item.description: Product catalog endpoints. Public read endpoints + admin CRUD.

item.name: Public
item.description: Public product catalog endpoints. No authentication required.

request.description:
Get filtered product listing with pagination. All query params are optional.

- category: filter by category slug (cameras, nvr-kits, accessories, storage, services)
- search: full-text search across product names and slugs
- sort: newest | price-asc | price-desc | name-asc
- minPrice / maxPrice: price range filter
- specs: JSON string of spec filters, e.g. {"brand":["Tiandy","Dahua"]}
- subcategorySpecFilter: JSON string for virtual subcategory, e.g. {"kaKey":"...","value":"..."}
- locale: ka | ru | en (for name-based sorting)
- hasDiscount: true to return only discounted products (originalPrice > price)
Get catalog configuration including category tree with virtual subcategories and filter definitions per category.
Get available filter values with counts for a given category. Returns spec key/value pairs with the number of matching products.
Get min/max price for products in a category (optionally filtered by subcategory spec).
Get product counts per category and virtual subcategory.
Get featured products (isActive + isFeatured, ordered by createdAt desc).
Get discounted products (originalPrice > price). Uses the catalog endpoint with hasDiscount filter.

item.name: Get Product by Slug or ID

request.description: Get a single product by slug or UUID. Set {{productSlug}} to a product slug (e.g. 'tiandy-5-indoor-camera-1-4') or product ID.
Get related products for a given product. Uses explicit relatedProducts IDs or falls back to same-category products.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin product management endpoints. Requires ADMIN role. Auth inherited from collection root.

request.description: List all active categories with IDs, slugs, and localized names. Requires ADMIN role.
Get spec key suggestions based on existing products. Requires ADMIN role.
Upload a product image. Returns the URL to use in product images array. Requires ADMIN role.
Delete a product image by URL. Requires ADMIN role.

body.raw:
{
  "slug": "test-product",
  "price": 199,
  "originalPrice": 249,
  "currency": "GEL",
  "isActive": true,
  "isFeatured": false,
  "images": [],
  "nameKa": "ტესტ პროდუქტი",
  "nameRu": "Тестовый продукт",
  "nameEn": "Test Product",
  "descriptionKa": "ტესტ აღწერა",
  "descriptionRu": "Тестовое описание",
  "descriptionEn": "Test description",
  "categoryIds": [],
  "specs": [
    {
      "keyKa": "ბრენდი",
      "keyRu": "Бренд",
      "keyEn": "Brand",
      "value": "Test"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Create a new product. Requires ADMIN role.
Update an existing product by ID. All fields are optional. Requires ADMIN role.
Delete a product by ID. Cascades to specs and category links. Requires ADMIN role.
Update the catalog config singleton (category tree + filter definitions). Requires ADMIN role.
Get paginated list of all products (active and inactive) with optional filters. Requires ADMIN role.
Toggle a product's isActive status. No body needed. Requires ADMIN role.
Set isActive status for multiple products at once. Requires ADMIN role.
Delete multiple products at once. Cascades to specs and category links. Requires ADMIN role.

item.name: Projects
item.description: Completed projects portfolio. Public read + admin CRUD.

item.name: Public
item.description: Public project endpoints. No authentication required.

request.description: Get active projects sorted by sortOrder. Optional limit query param (default 10, max 50).
Get a single project by UUID.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin project management. Requires ADMIN role.

request.description: Get paginated list of all projects (active and inactive). Optional isActive filter.

body.raw:
{
  "title": { "ka": "ტესტ პროექტი", "ru": "", "en": "Test Project" },
  "location": { "ka": "თბილისი", "ru": "", "en": "Tbilisi" },
  "type": "commercial",
  "cameras": 24,
  "year": "2024",
  "isActive": true,
  "sortOrder": 0,
  "tagIds": [],
  "faqs": [
    {
      "question": { "ka": "რა სისტემა დაიმონტაჟა?", "en": "What system was installed?" },
      "answer": { "ka": "24 კამერიანი IP სისტემა", "en": "24-camera IP system" },
      "sortOrder": 0
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Create a new project. Requires ADMIN role.
Update an existing project. All fields optional. Requires ADMIN role.
Delete a project and its associated image. Requires ADMIN role.

formdata.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 10MB)

request.description: Upload or replace a project's image. Optimized to WebP at max 1200x800. Requires ADMIN role.

item.name: Site Settings
item.description: Site-wide settings (stats, contact, hours, social). Public read + admin update.

request.description: Get all site settings. Public endpoint — used by homepage for stats.
Update site settings (deep merge). Only provided fields are updated. Requires ADMIN role.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints. Requires ADMIN role. Auth inherited from collection root.

item.name: User Management
item.description: Manage users by ID. Requires ADMIN role. Set {{targetUserId}} before calling.

request.description: Update a user's profile by ID. Requires owner or admin access.
Change a user's password by ID. Admin: only newPassword required. Invalidates all target user sessions.
Soft-delete a user's account by ID. No password required for admin. Invalidates all target user sessions.

formdata.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 10MB)

request.description: Upload or replace a user's avatar by ID. Requires admin access. Accepts JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
Delete a user's avatar by ID. Requires admin access.
List all blocked IP addresses. Returns permanent blocks and active auto-blocks separately.
Permanently block an IP address. Persisted to database and cached in Redis. Blocked IPs receive 403 IP_BLOCKED on all requests. Optional reason field for audit trail.
Remove an IP from the permanent block list. Also removes it from auto-blocks if present.

item.name: Tags
item.description:
Tag management endpoints.

Public: list all tags.
Admin: create, update, delete tags.

item.name: Articles
item.description:
Blog article endpoints.

Public: list published, get by slug.
Admin: full CRUD, cover upload, toggle publish.

request.description: Get published articles with optional category filter. Public endpoint.
Get a single published article by its slug. Public endpoint.
Get all articles (published and drafts). Admin only.
Get a single article by ID (including drafts). Admin only.
Create a new article. Admin only. Sets {{articleId}} on success.
Update an existing article. Admin only.
Upload a cover image for an article. Admin only.
Upload a content image for an article. Returns the image URL to embed in article content. Admin only.
Toggle article publish status. Admin only.
Delete an article and its cover image. Admin only.

item.name: Orders
item.description:
Order management endpoints.

Public: create order (cart checkout).
Admin: list orders, get by ID, update status.

request.description: Create a new order from cart checkout. Public endpoint (no auth required). Sets {{orderId}} on success.
Get all orders with optional status filter and search. Admin only.
Get a single order with all items. Admin only.
Update order status. Valid values: NEW, CONTACTED, COMPLETED. Admin only.
Delete an order by ID. Admin only.
Update status for multiple orders at once. Valid statuses: NEW, CONTACTED, COMPLETED. Admin only.
Add a note to an order. Admin only.

item.name: Inquiries
item.description:
Contact form inquiry endpoints.

Public: submit inquiry.
Admin: list inquiries, delete inquiry.

request.description: Submit a contact form inquiry. Public endpoint (no auth required). Sets {{inquiryId}} on success.
Get all inquiries with optional search. Admin only.
Delete an inquiry. Admin only.
